Policy: Lockup And Sanctions Only NFT Guard
Description: Use Forte for NFT blacklist and token lockup enforcement without an emergency pause control surface.

CallingFunctions.Name: transferFrom
CallingFunctions.FunctionSignature: transferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 tokenId)
CallingFunctions.EncodedValues: address operator, address from, address to, uint256 tokenId, uint256 blockTime, uint256 tokenUnlockTime, uint256 fromBlacklistFlag, uint256 toBlacklistFlag, uint256 treasuryBypass, uint256 transfersPausedFlag

CallingFunctions.Name: safeTransferFrom
CallingFunctions.FunctionSignature: safeTransferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 tokenId)
CallingFunctions.EncodedValues: address operator, address from, address to, uint256 tokenId, uint256 blockTime, uint256 tokenUnlockTime, uint256 fromBlacklistFlag, uint256 toBlacklistFlag, uint256 treasuryBypass, uint256 transfersPausedFlag

CallingFunctions.Name: safeTransferFromWithData
CallingFunctions.FunctionSignature: safeTransferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 tokenId, bytes data)
CallingFunctions.EncodedValues: address operator, address from, address to, uint256 tokenId, uint256 blockTime, uint256 tokenUnlockTime, uint256 fromBlacklistFlag, uint256 toBlacklistFlag, uint256 treasuryBypass, uint256 transfersPausedFlag

Rules.Name: Transfer Blacklist Check
Rules.Description: Block NFT transfers that involve blacklisted addresses.

Rules.Name: Transfer Lockup Check
Rules.Description: Prevent NFT transfers before the token unlock time unless treasury bypass is active.

Rules.Name: SafeTransfer Blacklist Check
Rules.Description: Block safe transfers that involve blacklisted addresses.

Rules.Name: SafeTransfer Lockup Check
Rules.Description: Prevent safe transfers before unlock time unless treasury bypass is active.

Rules.Name: SafeTransferWithData Blacklist Check
Rules.Description: Block safe transfers with data that involve blacklisted addresses.

Rules.Name: SafeTransferWithData Lockup Check
Rules.Description: Prevent safe transfers with data before unlock time unless treasury bypass is active.
